title: Coogent Secrets Allowlist
description: Configuration to reduce false positives in SecretsGuard entropy scanning.

allowed_patterns.description: Regex patterns for high-entropy strings that should bypass detection (e.g., base64 config, hash constants).

allowed_hashes.description: SHA-256 hex digests of known-safe values. Compute via: echo -n 'value' | shasum -a 256
